text: cocok banget untuk tamasya bareng teman atau keluarga karena tempatnya luas banyak free seating area tiket masuk murah rp 35 ribu per orang dan wahana permainannya juga bisa dinikmati bersama seperti boat rental dan rainbow slides ada mini zoo juga isinya angsa domba ayam n burung hias

text: tempat favorit untuk ngadem sudah seringkali kesini mulai dari tugu polisi yang belum diganti sampai sekarang telah direnovasi cocok untuk pemula yang ingin nanjak view kota dan udara lembang ya adem buat camping juga enak di atas sekali ada bangunan bersejarah bekas jaman penjajahan dulu

text: tempatnya bagus dan cukup luas cuma beberapa tempat dibatasi dan harus bayar kembali harga tiket masuk rp 20 - variasi makanan cukup banyak dan terjangkau untuk harga sekelas tempat wisata namun membeli harus menggunakan koin yang bisa ditukarkan di sana membeli koin secukupnya saja karena tidak dapat diuangkan kembali
english_translation: The place is nice and quite spacious, although some areas are restricted and require an additional entrance fee of Rp 20. The food variety is quite good and affordable for a tourist spot, but you have to buy food using coins that can be exchanged there. Buy just enough coins as they are non-refundable.

text: tempatnya mudah dijangkau pemandangannya bagus banget terbentuk secara alami yang katanya dari jaman purba airnya jernih banyak dipakai prewedding juga tiket masuknya sangat terjangkau hanya 8-10 ribu orang parkir mobil juga sekitar segitu ada guide juga di sana kalo mau arung jeram naik perahu lanjut ke sanghyang heuleut
english_translation: The place is easily accessible, the scenery is very beautiful, naturally formed, said to be from ancient times, the water is clear, often used for pre-wedding photos. The entrance ticket is very affordable, only 8-10 thousand, car parking is also around that price. There are guides there too if you want to go rafting or take a boat to Sanghyang Heuleut.

text: tempatnya enak untuk dikunjungi namun sayang bagi orang yang ingin kesini harap membawa duit banyak karena wahananya memiliki harga yang lumayan meskipun begitu wahananya worth itu lah sesuai dengan harga juga overall 10 10 semuanya ada di sana wahana makanan minuman dan barang-barang ikon floating market tersebut
english_translation: The place is nice to visit, but unfortunately for those who want to come here, please bring a lot of money because the attractions are quite expensive. Despite that, the attractions are worth it and match the price. Overall, 10/10, everything is there, attractions, food, drinks, and the iconic floating market merchandise.

text: lokasi mudah dicari pelayanan ramah selain sebagai tempat rekreasi bisa menambah ilmu cara pengembang biakan tanaman begonia spot foto cantik-cantik instagramable halaman parkir tersedia toilet untuk rombongan tersedia tempat untuk berkumpul seperti aula menyediakan souvenir yang dijual seperti mug bergambar gantungan kunci bibit benih
english_translation: Easy to find location, friendly service. Besides being a recreational spot, it can also increase knowledge on how to cultivate begonia plants. Beautiful, Instagrammable photo spots. Parking space available. Toilets available for groups. Gathering areas such as halls are provided. Souvenirs are sold, such as mugs with pictures, keychains, and begonia seeds.

text: tempat wisatanya okee kalo kalian datang kesitu lebih baik pagi pagi sekalian saat sunset lagi mau terbit di sana masih adem dan dapat foto yang bagus kalo deh siang agak mulai panas di sana cocok buat foto prewedding bertema journey dan jangan lupa berbagi sama kera di sana dia baik enggak begitu liar asal kitanya saja bagaimana ke dia
english_translation: The tourist spot is okay. If you come there, it's better to come in the morning, especially around sunset. It's still cool there and you can get good photos. In the afternoon, it starts to get a bit hot. It's suitable for pre-wedding photos with a journey theme. And don't forget to share with the monkeys there. They are friendly and not too wild, as long as you are good to them.

text: mau ke sini lagi di sana 3 jam kurang sayangnya harus bayar pas mau ke jembatan bisa piknik 1 jam main golf mini 1 stgh jam foto di satu area bisa 15 menitan belum lagi video-video dan explore bunga-bunga wah 3 jam enggak berasa deh cocok main dari jam buka sampai jam tutup deh worth itu and definitely visit again ini the future
english_translation: I want to come back here again, 3 hours there, unfortunately I had to pay. When I wanted to go to the bridge, I could picnic for 1 hour, play mini golf for 1.5 hours, take photos in one area for about 15 minutes, not to mention videos and exploring the flowers. Wow, 3 hours flew by. It's suitable to play from opening time until closing time. It's worth it and I will definitely visit again in the future.

text: sayang hujan deres pas sampai sini jadi enggak bisa eksplore banyak spot foto dimana-dimana area outbound untuk anak wisata petik buah hutan pinus plus hawanya sejuk banget tiket masuk 15rb kalo enggak salah tapi belum termasuk wahana kayak outbound dll cocok banget buat wisata keluarga aksesnya lebih dekat kalo via subang dan enggak macet juga
english_translation: It's a shame it rained heavily when we got here, so we couldn't explore many photo spots everywhere. The outbound area for kids, fruit picking in the pine forest, plus the really cool weather. The entrance ticket was 15k, if I'm not mistaken, but it didn't include attractions like outbound, etc. It's very suitable for family trips. Access is closer if via Subang and not jammed either.

text: gunung tangkuban parahu harga tiket masuk 30k orang 17k 2k motor enggak mengerti ini tiketnya bagaimana harga weekend jalan menuju puncak lumayan ekstrim dengan menggunakan motor sampai di puncak spot foto banyak suhu di puncak dingin banget disarankan menggunakan pakaian tebal jaket tebal dan sarung tangan angin di puncak sangat kencang
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu Mountain entrance ticket price 30k per person, 17k for foreign tourists, 2k for motorcycles. I don't understand how these tickets work. Weekend prices. The road to the summit is quite extreme by motorcycle. Once you reach the summit, there are many photo spots. The temperature at the summit is very cold. It is recommended to wear thick clothing, a thick jacket, and gloves. The wind at the summit is very strong.

text: tempat wisata yang berbedaa dari tempat yang lain disini menyajikan makanan-makanan yang dijual diatas perahu secara terapung selain itu disini juga banyak spot poto dan juga ada kolam berenang yang sangat nyaman dengan membayar tiket masuk kita dapat menukarkan tiket tersebut dengan minuman atau makanan yang telah disediakan khusus
english_translation: A tourist spot different from others, here they serve food sold on floating boats. Besides that, there are also many photo spots and a very comfortable swimming pool. By paying the entrance ticket, we can exchange the ticket for drinks or food that have been specially provided.

text: recommended buat yang suka trekking seru juga buat main air dekat curugnya bagusnya kalo kesini harus benar-benar sehat biar kuat sampai curugnya apalagi pulangnya mantap poll di kaki cuman kemarin air terjunnya kelihatan coklat sebagian terus banyak sampah di pinggiran kali bawahnya kalobisa dirawat dan diperbagus lagi tempat istirahatnya
english_translation: Recommended for those who enjoy exciting trekking and also for playing in the water near the waterfall. It's best to come here when you're really healthy so you can make it to the waterfall, especially on the way back, which is amazing for your legs. However, yesterday the waterfall looked partially brown and there was a lot of trash along the riverbanks below. If possible, the resting area could be maintained and improved.

text: tempat yang cocok buat orang-orang yang suka sama bunga-bunga dan tanaman bunga a warna-warni cantik banget tertata dengan rapi dan apik banyak spot-spot foto kemarin pas datang ternyata aku pengunjung pertama jadi puas banget keliling-keliling dan foto-foto berasa kebun sendiri tiket masuk 25rb orang parkir 5rb toiletnya cukup bersih
english_translation: A perfect place for people who love flowers and beautiful, colorful plants. It's neatly and tastefully arranged with many photo spots. Yesterday, when I visited, I was the first visitor, so I was very satisfied exploring and taking photos, feeling like it was my own garden. Entrance ticket is 25k per person, parking is 5k. The toilets are quite clean.

text: tempatnya nyaman banget sejuk wat santai santai sambil minum kopi sambil menunggu anak anak main karena banyak permainan untuk anak-anaknya ada kereta mini juga untuk keliling taman sepeda yang disewakan ada kuda poni juga untuk anak-anak yang mau bermain kuda parkirannya luas pokoknya recommended banget wat ajak keluarga
english_translation: The place is really comfortable and cool, perfect for relaxing while having coffee and waiting for the kids to play. There are lots of games for the children, including a mini train to go around the park, bicycles for rent, and also pony rides for the kids who want to play with horses. The parking lot is spacious. It's definitely highly recommended for bringing the family.

text: taman bunga dan sayuran yang lumayan luas nyaman buat wisata sambil mengajari anak tentang bunga dan sayuran hanya sayang banyak tanaman sayuran yang seperti tidak ter urus dengan baik jadi banyak yang layu deh rontok daunnya semoga kedepannya bisa lebih di perhatikan lagi untuk kebersihan dan perawatan tanaman buah dan sayurannya
english_translation: A fairly large flower and vegetable garden, comfortable for visiting while teaching children about flowers and vegetables. It's a pity, though, that many vegetable plants seem not to be well-maintained, so many are wilted and their leaves have fallen off. Hopefully, in the future, more attention can be given to the cleanliness and maintenance of the fruit and vegetable plants.

text: suka banget pemandangannya asyik banyak yang jualan masker dibawah tapi kalo sudah diatas tidak berasa bau belerangnya ketiup angin jadi masker kurang berfungsi kalo pengin lebih maksimal lagi naik ke tempat yang paling tinggi untuk mengcover foto biar bisa keambil semua jadi hasil fotonya bagus harga tiket weekday 25rb

There are many mask sellers below, but once you're at the top, the sulfur smell doesn't feel it as it's blown away by the wind, so the masks are less effective. If you want to maximize it further, go up to the highest spot to cover the photos so they can all be taken, making the photos look good. Weekday ticket price is 25,000 IDR.

text: bagus banget taman bunga begitu deh mungkin jenis bunganya enggak sebanyak di floating market tapi penataannya bagus terus kalau jalan ke dalem bisa lihat kebun sayurnya dan enggak bakal ada penjaga yang mengikuti pas lagi jalan-jalan bisa banget buat foto-foto tapi jangan sampai merusak cocok untuk melepas penat dari suasana lampu kota
english_translation: The flower garden is really beautiful. Maybe the types of flowers aren't as many as at the floating market, but the arrangement is nice. Then, if you walk further inside, you can see the vegetable garden. There won't be any guards following you while you're strolling. It's great for taking photos, but don't damage anything. It's suitable for relieving stress from the city lights.

text: tempatnya cocok banget buat camping hiking atau acara outing untuk wahana ada flying fox shaking bridge three ini one sama paint ball kalo enggak salah namanya haha alat camping bisa sewa dan untuk harga enggak mahal kok harga wajar dan enaknya tuh enggak banyak kena biaya cuma memang kesan "hutan-hutan-nya kurang kerasa kalau siang
english_translation: The place is very suitable for camping, hiking, or outing events. For attractions, there's a flying fox, shaking bridge, three-in-one, and paintball, if I'm not mistaken, haha. Camping equipment can be rented, and the price isn't expensive, it's reasonable. The good thing is there aren't many additional costs, but indeed, the "foresty" feel is less noticeable during the day.

text: lokasinya ada kp parongpong lembang bandung barat ht-ht di jalannya karena tepat di lembah tebingnya curam masih banyak kerak liar harus penuh ke hati-hatian usahakan jalan bersamaan dan ada intrukturnya yang tau seluk beluk lokasinya udaranya bersih dan airnya dingin banget yang punya rematic atau encok harus bawa minyak gosok yang anget
english_translation: The location is in Kampung Parongpong, Lembang, West Bandung. Be careful on the road as it is right on a steep cliff. There are still many wild monkeys, so you must be very cautious. Try to travel together and have an instructor who knows the area well. The air is clean and the water is very cold. Those with rheumatism or joint pain should bring warming massage oil.

text: ke sini bawa doggy ternyata enggak bisa ke tempat utamanya sudah bayar tiket masuk bayar lagi di dalem untuk pet dan hanya jalur lurus tanpa ada spot foto seharusnya tidak usah ada tiket masuk karena pengunjungnya tidak dapat benefit apapun padahal datang jauh dari jakarta ekspektasi bisa foto-foto malah pulang tanpa hasil
english_translation: Here, brought the doggy, turns out it can't go to the main area. Paid the entrance ticket, then paid again inside for pets, and only a straight path without photo spots. There shouldn't have been an entrance fee because visitors don't get any benefit at all, even though they came from far away in Jakarta. Expected to take photos, but went home with nothing.

text: sudah tertata rapi cocok untuk dikunjungi dari anak-anak hingga orang tua dengan aman nyaman bawa tikar digelar buka bekal asik lah kalo mau santai dan terhindar macet jam 7 pagi sudah di lokasi keliling-keliling santai-santai siang bisa pulang hanya kalau untuk petualang sangat kurang karena treknya dipotong jadi hanya bisa lihat 3 curug
english_translation: nicely arranged and suitable for a visit by anyone from children to the elderly, safely and comfortably. Bring a mat, spread it out, and enjoy your packed lunch. It's great if you want to relax and avoid traffic. Arrive at the location by 7 AM, stroll around leisurely, and head home by noon. However, it's quite lacking for adventurers because the trail has been cut short, so you can only see 3 waterfalls.

text: wisata kuliner yang cukup luas dengan udara yang sejuk datang saat musim liburan dan musim hujan lumayan padat akses masuknya dari jalan raya lembang harus masuk lagi saat pulang diarahkan lewat belakang ternyata ada tanjakan yang sangat curam dan cukup panjang kalau mobilnya tidak kuat lebih baik mengambil arah yang biasa
english_translation: A fairly extensive culinary tour with cool air, it's quite crowded when you come during the holiday and rainy seasons. Access from the Lembang highway requires you to go in again. When returning, you are directed to go through the back, and it turns out there is a very steep and quite long incline. If your car isn't strong enough, it's better to take the usual route.

text: tiket masuk 50ribu orang tapi worth itu sih karena dapat minum plus bisa foto di banyak spot foto bagus tapi untuk foto dijembatan merah bayar terpisah kalo mau kesini lebih enak pas weekday tempat enggak terlalu penuh jadi lebih leluasa buat selfie jangan khawatir harus jalan jauh kebawah karena ada mobil yang antar dari atas sampai ke depan pintu masuk sarae hill
english_translation: Entrance ticket is 50,000 per person, but it's worth it because you get a drink plus you can take photos at many good photo spots. However, photos on the red bridge require a separate fee. If you want to come here, it's better to come on a weekday. The place won't be too crowded, so you'll have more freedom to take selfies. Don't worry about having to walk far down, because there's a car that takes you from the top all the way to the entrance of Sarae Hill.

text: fasilitas di dalam kamar cukup baik hanya selimutnya lebih dingin dari cuaca sekitar mungkin karena bahannya yang kurang pas untuk menghangatkan cocok untuk acara-acara yang melibatkan banyak orang untuk keluarga juga cocok karena banyak taman-taman yang bisa digunakan anak-anak bermain makanan di restonya enak-enak terima kasih sukses selalu ya twgc
english_translation: The in-room facilities are quite good, only the blanket is colder than the surrounding weather, perhaps because the material is not suitable for warming. It's suitable for events involving many people, and also good for families because there are many gardens where children can play. The food at the restaurant is delicious. Thank you, and best wishes always, twgc.

text: lokasinya sangat luas cocok untuk acara yang sekalian camping dan outbound banyak hal yang bisa dikunjungi disini dari pintu masuk ke tempatnya masih jauh bagi yang tidak membawa kendaraan pribadi ada jemputan shuttle dari pintu masuk harga ticket kemarin saya rp 40 0 - per orang dan shuttlenya rp 10 0 - per orang
english_translation: The location is very spacious, suitable for events that include camping and outbound activities. There are many things to visit here. From the entrance to the location, it's still quite far. For those without private vehicles, there is a shuttle pick-up from the entrance. The ticket price yesterday was Rp 40,000 per person and the shuttle was Rp 10,000 per person.

text: harga tiket masuk 22 500 per orang anak anak beda harganya 5 tahun ke bawah gratis tempat yang mengasikan untuk melihat kawah ratu yaitu saat pagi hari alamnya sejuk berkabut banyak penjual souvenir banyak penyewa kuda untuk dinaiki sekedar foto banyak tukang foto saya dan saudara sangat menikmati liburan di twa gunung tangkuban parahu
english_translation: Entrance ticket price 22,500 per person, children have different prices, 5 years and under are free. The most enjoyable time to see the Ratu crater is in the morning, the air is cool and misty. There are many souvenir sellers, many horse rental services for riding or just for photos, and many photographers. My family and I really enjoyed our holiday at TWA Mount Tangkuban Parahu.
